questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Containers Foundation?
options: Inefficient scaling of Linux namespaces isolates (PID, net, mount).
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Linux namespaces isolates (PID, net, mount).
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Linux namespaces isolates (PID, net, mount) scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
